articles.title: Starbucks Polygon NFTs Are Already Selling for Thousands
articles.description: Early Starbucks Odyssey users are already flipping the free NFT stamps for nearly $2,000 apiece ahead of the platform's public rollout.

articles.title: New Upgrade Pushes Cardano Over $0.4, What’s Next?
articles.description: The recent Cardano (ADA) upgrade to increase cross-chain interoperability has propelled the price of ADA above $0.420, breaking the range formed after January 8, 2023. ADA’s price action has been slow-paced, full of sideways movement. However, with the upgrade on Cardano’s network, investors may see a turn and expect more bullish movements in ADA’s price action. articles.title: Where’s MATIC Headed After Retesting The $1.30 Price Mark?
articles.description: The MATIC price has been depicting bullish sentiments over the past few days, pushing the altcoin to break past its rigid price resistance mark. Over the last 24 hours, the altcoin soared close to 8%, and MATIC appreciated by 4.7% in the previous week. Bitcoin has begun to rally, and major altcoins and market movers have risen on their respective charts. The technical outlook has started...

articles.title: Coinbase Weighs In on SEC Banning Binance USD (BUSD), Says Stablecoins Are Not Securities
articles.description: Top US crypto exchange Coinbase is weighing in on the regulatory uncertainty swirling around stablecoins this week. The issue is getting attention because New York-based crypto company Paxos said on Monday that it received a “Wells Notice” from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on February 3rd.
